No evidence suggests malicious intent here.\n\n- **Scores assigned to each issue?**  \n  All reports assign a malware score of 0, which is appropriate given the content.  \n  The security risk scores are also 0, which aligns with the analysis.\n\n- **Justification for risk scores > 0.5?**  \n  None of the reports assign a risk higher than 0.5, which is correct. All reports correctly identify the file as benign.\n\n---\n\n### Final assessment:\n- **Actual malware score:** 0  \n- **Obfuscated score:** 0 (no obfuscation detected)  \n- **Risk score:** 0 (no security risk)\n\n**Summary:**\nThis file is a typical autogenerated TypeScript declaration with an embedded source map.
